title: A UFO Cult Descends Into Madness In Ahoy's THE FORGOTTEN DIVINE

description: UFO Enthusiasts Were Waiting for a Sign. They Got Spielberg’s ‘Disclosure Day.’ WSJ Hungry for a real ‘disclosure day,’ some UFO watchers are miffed at Trump The Washington Post UFOs exist. Aliens? Maybe. The truth is out there - but whose going to tell us about it? Toronto Star How Alien Conspiracy Theory Got Respectable — and Brought America Back to Magical Thinking Variety How Trump explains Disclosure Day and America’s new UFO boom thenewworld.co.uk

title: This powerful UFO isn’t alien life, it’s a black hole unleashing a cosmic storm
description: A mysterious object speeding across the universe might look like a UFO, but the real story is even more fascinating. Scientists have discovered a supermassive black hole unleashing powerful winds at incredible speeds from a distant galaxy. These cosmic storms are strong enough to influence how galaxies grow and how stars are born. The finding offers a rare window into the universe's most active era billions of years ago.

title: UFO Expert Says People 'Have Been Ready', Demands Government To 'Show The Alien'
description: Neil deGrasse Tyson calls for government transparency on UFO, UAP and extraterrestrial evidence, arguing that public exposure to sci-fi has prepared society for potential alien revelations.

title: ‘Show the aliens’: Scientist Neil deGrasse Tyson makes bold demand after UFO files release
description: After the latest UFO files release, astrophysicist Neil deGrasse Tyson has a simple demand: stop teasing and “show the alien,” and the internet is loving the blunt call.
